title: Flea Treatment in Gowanus, Brooklyn | $350-$650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Gowanus, Brooklyn. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Gowanus home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Gowanus, Brooklyn, with prices ranging from $350 to $650 depending on the size and severity of the infestation. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages, ensuring your property is flea-free and safe for your family and pets.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Gowanus residents and businesses, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with advanced treatment methods to deliver results that last. We understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn properties, from converted industrial lofts to classic brownstones, and tailor our flea treatment approach to your specific needs with safe, pet-friendly solutions.
localContext: Gowanus's mix of historic rowhouses, converted warehouses, and modern residential developments along the Gowanus Canal creates diverse environments where fleas can thrive, especially in ground-floor units and buildings with shared outdoor spaces. The neighborhood's growing population of pet owners and proximity to green spaces like the Gowanus Canal Park makes professional flea treatment essential for maintaining comfortable, pest-free living spaces.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Gowanus?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Gowanus typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no hidden fees, and can often accommodate same-day or next-day service for urgent cases.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with adult fleas dying quickly after application. However, because flea eggs and pupae can remain dormant, we typically recommend a follow-up treatment after 14-21 days to eliminate newly hatched fleas and break the complete lifecycle. Full eradication usually takes 2-4 weeks depending on the severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend that pets and people leave the treated area for 2-4 hours during application and until surfaces are dry. All our technicians are licensed and trained in safe application methods, and we can discuss pet-friendly treatment options during your consultation.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Gowanus apartment before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation helps ensure the best results. We recommend vacuuming all floors and furniture thoroughly, washing pet bedding in hot water, removing pet food and water bowls, and ensuring pets are treated by a veterinarian. You should also plan for pets and residents to be out of the apartment for 2-4 hours during treatment. We'll provide a complete preparation checklist when you book your appointment.
